author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

May Preseason Patch - LIVE NOW

The May Preseason patch is now LIVE on the Epic Games Store!  

Major highlights include:
Dedicated servers for gunplay lobbies with 4 or more players,Paizul's Arena overhaul and Gateway redesign,Pearce X5 in-game model completion,Custom keybind remapping and improve controller support,Co-op dogfighting,Multiplayer racing improvements,Mining minigame improvements,
Join us for a release party at today's Atlas Brew in one hour, mark interested here: https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1370139119459500083

Need access? Grab a key here: ⁠🔑┃game-access-key
